pages.title: Overview
pages.purpose: Introduce the Blockchain-Enhanced CI/CD Artifact Verification System, explaining its purpose, high-level architecture, and how it mitigates supply chain attacks and insider threats

pages.title: Core Concepts
pages.purpose: Explain the fundamental concepts and security model underlying the system, including how blockchain provides immutable verification

pages.title: Sign-then-Verify Workflow
pages.purpose: Detail the two-phase workflow where Terraform plans are registered on-chain during review, then cryptographically verified before deployment

pages.title: Security Gates and Threat Model
pages.purpose: Explain the four security gates in the deployment pipeline and how they protect against tampering, unauthorized changees, and supply chain attacks

pages.title: Blockchain Layer
pages.purpose: Document the Ethereum smart contract infrastructure that provides immutable verification and token incentives

pages.title: BlockCICD Smart Contract
pages.purpose: Document the Solidity smart contract, its functions (storeHash, verifyHash), events, and ERC20 token implementation

pages.title: Contract Deployment
pages.purpose: Explain how the smart contract is deployed to Sepolia testnet via ChatOps, including the deploy_contract.py script and simulation mode

pages.title: DevOps Trust Tokens (DTT)
pages.purpose: Explain the DTT token economics, minting mechanisms, and how tokens serve as proof of verification activities

pages.title: CI/CD Workflows
pages.purpose: Document the GitHub Actions workflows that orchestrate ChatOps commands, plan generation, verification, and deployment

pages.title: ChatOps Planning Workflow
pages.purpose: Detail the chatops-plan.yml workflow that handles /tfplan and /tfplanfinal commands for plan generation and registration

pages.title: Deployment Workflow
pages.purpose: Document the deploy-apply.yml workflow that verifies plan hashes and deploys infrastructure with security gates

pages.title: Supporting Workflows
pages.purpose: Document the image building and contract deployment ChatOps workflows that support the main pipeline

pages.title: Infrastructure
pages.purpose: Document the AWS infrastructure provisioned by Terraform, including S3 buckets, Lambda functions, and their security configurations

pages.title: S3 Buckets
pages.purpose: Detail the three S3 buckets: blockchain-state (Terraform state), blockchain-artifacts (private storage), and auditor-dashboard (public website)

pages.title: Lambda Verification API
pages.purpose: Document the Lambda function deployment, container configuration, environment variables, and public API endpoints

pages.title: Terraform Configuration
pages.purpose: Document Terraform variables, outputs, state backend configuration, and how infrastructure is parameterized

pages.title: Lambda Container Build
pages.purpose: Document how the Lambda function Docker container is built from Dockerfile.lambda, including dependencies and FastAPI application structure

pages.title: Verification Tools
pages.purpose: Document the tools available for verifying artifact integrity, both internal (tf_guard.py) and external (API and dashboard)

pages.title: tf_guard.py CLI
pages.purpose: Document the Python CLI tool for registering and verifying Terraform plan hashes, including commands, exit codes, and error handling

pages.title: Public Verification API
pages.purpose: Document the Lambda-based REST API for external verification, including endpoints, request/response formats, and authentication

pages.title: Auditor Dashboard
pages.purpose: Document the static HTML/JavaScript dashboard that displays real-time verification events, DTT token supply, and provides transparency

pages.title: Configuration and Setup
pages.purpose: Provide guides for configuring and deploying the system, including required secrets, environment variables, and deployment procedures

pages.title: Environment Variables and Secrets
pages.purpose: Document all required environment variables and GitHub Secrets, including ETHEREUM_RPC_URL, DEPLOYER_PRIVATE_KEY, and AWS_ROLE_ARN

pages.title: Initial Deployment Guide
pages.purpose: Step-by-step guide for deploying the system from scratch, including contract deployment, infrastructure provisioning, and testing

pages.title: Reference
pages.purpose: Quick reference documentation for commands, APIs, and configuration options

pages.title: ChatOps Commands Reference
pages.purpose: Complete reference of all ChatOps commands (/tfplan, /tfplanfinal, /deploy_contract, /create_image) with parameters and expected behavior

pages.title: Smart Contract ABI Reference
pages.purpose: Complete reference of the BlockCICD contract ABI, including all functions, events, and data structures

pages.title: Terraform Variables Reference
pages.purpose: Complete reference of all Terraform variables, their types, defaults, and usage in infrastructure provisioning
